selection_scope: Questions explicitly about adoptive-cell products, their manufacture, phenotype, function, persistence, or translation.
domain_specific_assumptions: Separate product-level, donor/patient-level, assay-level, and disease-context evidence.
Treat CAR-T-intrinsic, product-intrinsic, tumor-intrinsic, and TME-intrinsic mechanisms as distinct claim scopes.
Require direct product-level measurement before a product mechanism claim.
experiment_design_axes: donor or patient as biological unit
